" Please think of an ideal job, disregarding your present job, if you have one. In choosing ideal job, how important would it be to you to have sufficient time for your personal or home life,
1 = of utmost importance, 2 = very important, 3 = of moderate importance, 4 = of little importance, 5 = of very little or no importance "
